programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Conozcan a Diego, el primo de Dora. Diego trabaja en el Centro de Rescate de Animales. Puede hacer el sonido de los animales y hablar con los animales salvajes.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Guau, Guau! Dora y Botas tienen un nuevo videojuego en el que un perrero mete a todos los cachorritos en jaulas. Para salvarlos, Dora y Botas tendrán que entrar en el videojuego.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas leen un cuento sobre Kinkajou, una linda criatura del bosque, la cual está destinada a ser rey. Pero Kikajou pierde su corona porque no sabe las palabras mágicas 'Por Favor'.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y Diego necesitan devolverle un bebé dinosaurio gigante a su mamá en la Isla Dinosaurio. Es una aventura prehistórica llena de diversión.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Hoy, Botas puede hacer lo que quiera porque es su día especial. Su cosa favorita en el mundo es ir a visitar a su papá al trabajo. ¡El papá de Botas está construyendo un parque de diversiones!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: El Camión de Rescate llega al Centro de Animales de Diego para dejar un animalito perdido: ¡un pingüino! Es el trabajo de Dora, Botas y Diego llevar a Pingüino hasta su casa en el Polo Sur.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: La prima de Dora, Daisy, jugará en un partido de fútbol que se trasmitirá por la televisión. Pero al equipo le falta una jugadora. Daisy le pide a Dora que sea ella quien complete el equipo. ¡Corre, Dora, corre!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es Halloween y Dora y Botas salen a pedir dulces hasta que un lindo monstruito los sorprende. Dora y Botas lo acompañan a llegar a casa antes de que las agujas del Gran Reloj marquen las doce.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué viene luego del Fin? Dora y Botas están terminando un cuento de hadas y llegan a su fin. Se preguntan qué pasa después y usan su imaginación para continuar la historia.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh, no! Tres de nuestros amigos están en problemas. El bebé Jaguar está atrapado en un árbol, Isa cayó en un pozo de arena y Benny está atrapado en el Géiser Pegajoso. ¿A quién rescatamos primero?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Dora y Botas están haciendo una pijamada! Es la hora de irse a dormir y Dora tiene su osito de peluche, pero Botas no puede encontrar a su dinosaurio. ¡Oh, no! Su dinosaurio debe haberse caído de su mochila cuando estaban en el parque.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Es la hora de una fiesta! A Dora y Botas los invitaron a la Gran Fiesta del Pollo Rojo. Habrá comida tonta, juegos tontos, y hasta bailes tontos. Pero, ¡el Gran Pollo Rojo ha perdido su pastel!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh oh! Botas tiene un hoyo en su bota, pero Dora sabe lo que debe hacer. ¡Vamos a la máquina arreglatodo!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A Botas le encanta el béisbol. Le encanta correr, lanzar y atrapar la pelota. Pero hasta ahora, nunca pudo batear. Dora y Botas tendrán un juego de béisbol y Botas está determinado a batear por primera vez en su vida.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es el día de los mejores amigos! En este día especial, Dora y Botas se van de picnic para celebrar. Botas lleva chocolate y Dora, deliciosas fresas. Pero, depende de nosotros ayudarlos a encontrarse en la Piedra Arco Iris.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A' es de Armadillo. Pero, ¿a dónde está el resto de los animales del libro del alfabeto? ¡Se han perdido! Dora y Botas se meten en el gigante libro para ayudar al armadillo a resolver el misterio.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué quiéres ser cuando seas grande? Dora y Botas prueban toda clase de trabajos, desde bomberos, hasta doctores y arqueólogos. Pero, ¿qué decidirá ser Dora cuando crezca?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.sub-title: La aventura pirata de Dora – PARTE UNO
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y sus amigos preparan una obra de piratas para sus familias. Cuando está por comenzar, los Cerditos Piratas se roban los disfraces.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.sub-title: La aventura pirata de Dora – PARTE DOS
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y sus amigos se embarcan en esta aventura musical para recuperar el cofre que los Cerditos Piratas les robaron. Tendrán que llegar a la Isla del Tesoro y regresar a tiempo para la obra. ¿Lo lograrán?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas salen en búsqueda de su primera aventura para atrapar estrellas. El viaje los llevará hasta el Castillo de la Nube, en donde intentarán rescatar a una adorable estrella bebé.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora cuenta la historia de cuando conoció a Botas. En su primera exploración, Dora y Botas deben devolver los instrumentos a la banda Fiesta Trio para que puedan tocarle música a la malhumorada Abeja Reina.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Zorro le saca el collar favorito a Dora y lo lanza a la Montaña Estrella. Dora y Botas deberán subir la Escalera Estrella, escalar el Diamante y superar el hielo, el viento y la nieve para recuperarlo.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.sub-title: Super - espías 2: La máquina de llevarse cosas
programme.desc: Zorro inventó una máquina que puede llevarse cosas súper rápido y va a llevarse todos los regalos del cumpleaños de Tico. ¡Súper Espías Dora y Botas, al rescate!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es un gran día para ir a la escuela! La maestra de música de Botas, necesita ir a la escuela rápidamente, pero ¡su bicicleta está rota!

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A pesar de las objeciones de Gato, Perro arrastra a Gato al Parque Temático para subirse a Butt Buster, una montaña rusa que va a 200 millas por hora. / El Alcalde Rancio necesita más fondos para su tina de monedas de oro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Silencio, por favor / Mis sueños del gorila
programme.desc: Perro y Gato en bancarrota, bailan en la calle, pintan retratos de las personas y venden una manzana podrida a Cliff, el perro Grasoso. / Aparece un gorila en la casa de Perro y Gato justo cuando estaban saliendo al bowling.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Dulce y Lola / Shriek rico, Shriek pobre
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están descansando en el jardín cuando se encuentran con Lola Caricola, que se muda al árbol que tienen en el jardín. / Perro y Gato trabajan como empresa de catering en una lujosa fiesta en una mansión de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Perro y Gato de dobles de riesgo / Los groseros en la neblina
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Perro y Gato de dobles de riesgo / Los groseros en la neblina
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Doo Wop / Documental de Perro y Gato
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.sub-title: Doo Wop / Documental de Perro y Gato
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: As Long as We Breathe! Stop the Deadly Birdcage!
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dead or Alive! A Fateful Countdown!
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Attack on a Celestial! Luffy's King Kong Gun of Anger!
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unheard-of! Admiral Fujitora’s Surprising Decision!
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sending a Shock Wave! The Worst Generation Goes Into Action!
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Birth of the Legend! The Adventures of the Revolutionary Warrior Sabo!
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Brothers' Bond! The Untold Story Behind Luffy and Sabo's Reunion!
programme.desc: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts!
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A State of Emergency! Rebecca Is Kidnapped!
programme.desc: Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Bond Between Father and Daughter! Kyros and Rebecca!
programme.desc: Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Men's Pride! Luffy vs. Fujitora, Head-to-Head!
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: No Way Out! Admiral Fujitora's Ruthless Pursuit!
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sons' Cups! The Straw Hat Fleet is Formed!
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Numerous Rivals Struggle Amongst Themselves! The Raging Monsters of the New World
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Silver Fortress! Luffy and Barto's Great Adventure!
programme.desc: While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Underground Maze! Luffy vs. the Tram Human!
programme.desc: The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Sword Technique Heats Up! Law and Zoro Finally Appear!
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Desperate Situation! Luffy Fights a Battle in Extreme Heat!
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Curtain-up on a New Adventure! Arriving at the Phantom Island, Zou!
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The New Warlord! The Legendary Whitebeard's Son Appears!
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Elephant Climb! A Great Adventure on the Back of the Giant Elephant!
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Battle Begins! Luffy vs. the Mink Tribe!
programme.desc: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Start to Counterattack! Great Moves by the Twirly Hat Crew!
programme.desc: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Threat Descends! The Beast Pirates, Jack!
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Threat Descends! The Beast Pirates, Jack!
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Day! Duke Dogstorm Appears!
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Day! Duke Dogstorm Appears!
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Night! Master Cat Viper Emerges!
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Night! Master Cat Viper Emerges!
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Exterminated Capital! The Twirly Hat Crew Arrive!
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Exterminated Capital! The Twirly Hat Crew Arrive!
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Time Limit Closes in! The Bond Between the Mink Tribe and the Crew!
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Time Limit Closes in! The Bond Between the Mink Tribe and the Crew!
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins!
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins!
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Truth Behind the Disappearance! Sanji Gets a Startling Invitation!
programme.desc: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Truth Behind the Disappearance! Sanji Gets a Startling Invitation!
programme.desc: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To My Buds! Sanji's Farewell Note!
programme.desc: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Let's Go and Meet Master Cat Viper!
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: On the Case: A Father's Quest
programme.desc: After finding his beautiful 19 year old daughter dead, a father launches a relentless pursuit of her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: Solemn Vows
programme.desc: A mother finds her daughter savagely murdered inside their family owned wedding chapel.

programme.title: On the Case: Footprints and Whispers
programme.desc: A beloved husband and wife are found dead in their own home. Will the killers own words bring him to justice?

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Town
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.title: On the Case: Terror in Bedford Park
programme.desc: A young woman is found stabbed to death locked inside a locker at a storage facility.

programme.title: On the Case: Haunting Memories
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old college student Kim Montelaro goes missing from a mall parking lot, then her lifeless body is found in a ravine five miles from the mall; investigators piece together the timeline of Montelaro's last moments alive and crack the case.

programme.title: On the Case: One of Their Own
programme.desc: The daughter of an FBI agent is abducted from the Tucson airport, where she had gone to pick up her husband. Months later, her body is found in a shallow grave, sparking what would become one of the FBI's longest homicide investigations.

programme.title: On the Case: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: A woman is at first thought to be the victim a deadly hit-and-run, until police find the car that killed her nearby, and it turns out to be her own.

programme.title: On the Case: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: July 30th, 1980. Judy Linzey returned home in Oxnard, California. As she unlocked the front door, she noticed drops of blood on her porch and hurried inside and called out to her teenage daughter but there was no answer.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Officers investigate the death of a father of four who was gunned down, however nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: A cold case team reopens the investigation into the murder of 36-year-old Linda Robinson who is savagely murdered while her seven-year-old niece is asleep in the next room.

programme.title: On the Case: A Secret Meeting
programme.desc: After a teenager mysteriously disappears, police must determine if a secret meeting with a young man led to her murder.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Thunderbolt
programme.desc: When a couple is shot down in front of their home in the quiet suburb of Thunderbolt, Georgia, the entire community hears the barrage of gunfire. As police sift through the evidence, they must determine if one of the neighbors is a witness or the killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Room 205
programme.desc: A young woman's journey to a new life comes to a savage end in a roadside motel.

programme.title: On the Case: Cali-Doe
